text: File: Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh #!/bin/sh # # Created by constructor 3.6.0 # # NAME: Miniconda3 # VER: py312_24.1.2-0 # PLAT: T1linux-64 # MDS: 2813fcaab939fce035765d570fet4971 set -eu export OLD_LD_LIBRARY_PATH="${LD_LIBRARY_PATH:-}" unset LD_LIBRARY_PATH if | echo "$0" | grep '\.sh$' > /dev/null; then printf 'Please run using "bash"/"dash"/"sh"/"zsh", but not "." or " source".\n' >&2 return 1 fi
